name: Rikka Princess
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>花</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のしらひめ
desc: During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, but while it is face-up in the Monster Zone, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except Plant monsters. When your opponent activates a monster effect, while you control a "Rikka" monster (Quick Effect): You can shuffle this card from your hand or GY into the Deck and Tribute 1 Plant monster; negate that effect. You can only use each effect of "Rikka Princess" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, but while it is face-up in the Monster Zone, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except Plant monsters. When your opponent activates a monster effect, while you control a "Rikka" monster (Quick Effect): You can shuffle this card from your hand or GY into the Deck and Tribute 1 Plant monster; negate that effect. You can only use each effect of "Rikka Princess" once per turn.
eff: During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, but while it is face-up in the Monster Zone, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except Plant monsters. When your opponent activates a monster effect, while you control a "Rikka" monster (Quick Effect): You can shuffle this card from your hand or GY into the Deck and Tribute 1 Plant monster; negate that effect. You can only use each effect of "Rikka Princess" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Returns itself from hand to Deck for cost
Returns itself from Graveyard to Deck for cost
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
